name: @actrium/supramark-d2-native-rn
description: React Native native FFI wrapper for d2-little — D2 diagrams to SVG via the supramark-d2-native Rust staticlib on iOS / Android.
author: kookyleo <kookyleo@gmail.com>

scripts.build: if command -v bob >/dev/null 2>&1; then BROWSERSLIST_IGNORE_OLD_DATA=1 bob build; else echo 'react-native-builder-bob not installed; skipping build'; fi
scripts.prepack: if command -v bob >/dev/null 2>&1; then BROWSERSLIST_IGNORE_OLD_DATA=1 bob build; fi
